creator: jrhett@netconsonance.com
text:
The attached patch upgrade RT from 3.8.1 to 3.8.2.

It also adds the option to disable graphviz dependancy.  Graphviz is used to build one, total ONE graph but requires half of the X11 tree in unused dependancies.  This should be fixed in graphviz, but an option to disable this also matches up with the configure option and that parity is good.

Fix: Attached path.

Patch attached with submission follows:
